objective: rfa CLI gains mutation commands. Full CLI parity with topology-ui spawn/kill ops. Campaign complete: substrate + mesh + 4 nodes + topology UI + CLI all live.
size: small — completed same-day as single chunk
in_scope: rfa mesh node add --type <gateway|broker|compute|registry> — POST /api/nodes/spawn, prints spawned/pid
rfa mesh node remove <node_name> — DELETE /api/nodes/{name}, prints killed/reason, exits 2 on 404
rfa mesh wait-converged --timeout <duration> --target <count> — polls /api/nodes every 1s, exits 0 on convergence, exits 1 on timeout
NodeType clap enum enforces gateway|broker|compute|registry at compile time
rafka.cli.command span per invocation with command + args tags
rafka.cli.http.request child spans for POST/DELETE calls (method, path, otel.kind=client)
rafka.cli.wait_loop child span per poll iteration (poll_count, target, current_count)
out_of_scope: Cross-service W3C trace propagation (rfa → topology-ui) — reqwest does not inject trace headers by default; separate task
exit_criteria: rfa mesh node add --type broker → spawned broker-XXXXXXXX pid=N — DONE (broker-05f26937)
rfa mesh node remove broker-XXXXXXXX → killed graceful — DONE (broker-05f26937)
rfa mesh wait-converged --timeout 60s --target 4 → exits 0 on convergence — DONE (1 poll)
All 7 command types visible in Jaeger as rafka.cli.command spans — DONE (17 total traces)
Cross-service trace propagation: NO (rfa traces stay in rfa service; topology-ui spawned spans in separate trace)
campaign_note: 10 of 10 sprints complete. Substrate (iroh mesh, 4 node types, telemetry) + control surfaces (topology-ui boot waterfall + spawn/kill UI, rfa CLI read + mutations) all shipped.
